pre_game.message: Hi, I'm G. This whole situation is pretty wild, but I'm hoping to make the most of it. What brings you to the game?
Hey G, I'm A. Honestly, I'm here for the money—I've got people back home counting on me, so I'm pretty determined to walk away with something. How about you?
Same here—I've got people back home I need to look out for too, so I'm definitely feeling that same pressure to win.
It really does add a lot of weight to it. Since we're both in similar spots, how are you feeling about the game itself?
A bit nervous, honestly. I’m not sure what to expect, but I’m trying to stay focused and hope we can all be relatively fair with each other.
I totally get that. Fairness would definitely make things easier, I just hope everyone else is on the same page as us.
Yeah, that's the big worry. Hopefully, once we get a feel for the others, we'll know who we can really trust.
Exactly. If we can find a few people we can actually rely on, it might make this whole thing a lot smoother.
I’m glad we see eye to eye. Having someone to count on would definitely take some of the pressure off.
For sure. It’s good to know we’re on the same page. I’m going to circulate a bit more before things kick off. Good luck!
Sounds good. Good luck to you too, let's catch up later!
